steps.title: Use the height context
steps.content: In the phrase of a good height, the word good describes Mr. French's physical stature. The passage says his height could be seen even while he was seated, so the word suggests notable size.

steps.title: Match size, not character
steps.content: A describes dependability, B describes behavior, and C describes skill. None fits a physical measurement. Considerable means notably large in amount or extent, which fits the description of his height. The answer is D.
